steps.title: Compute f(x) - g(x) and evaluate all choices
steps.content:
$$f(x) - g(x) = (2x^2 + 13x - 24) - (18x - 27) = 2x^2 - 5x + 3$$Check each choice:
  • A: $2x^2 + 7x - 15$ — the x coefficient is $+7$, not $-5$. Eliminate A.
  • B: $2x^2 - 5x + 3$ — matches our result exactly. That matches choice B — B is correct.
  • C: $2x^2 - x - 3$ — incorrect x and constant terms. Eliminate C.
  • D: $2x^2 + 31x - 51$ — would result from adding instead of subtracting g(x). Eliminate D.
